base.drop_desc: Drop Paracci session file or attachments to load automatically.
base.drop_unsupported_desc: This file cannot be dropped in the current view.

armor.report_info: This report is a real-time benchmark result measuring your device's Argon2id (Quantum Armor) performance. Paracci recommends the most secure sealing speed based on this data.

index.title: sessions
index.subtitle: encrypted · offline · traceless messaging
index.empty_desc: Start by creating a new encrypted channel.

auth.setup_2fa_desc: Add an extra layer of security to your PIN using an app like Google Authenticator.
auth.verify_2fa_desc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to continue.

unlock.init_desc: Set a strong PIN to protect your database.
unlock.init_hint: Must be at least 8 characters, no sequential or repeating numbers.
unlock.unlock_desc: Enter your device PIN to continue.
unlock.security_note_before: Your PIN is processed with the
unlock.security_note_after: algorithm to derive your device key. The key is never stored in plaintext on disk.
unlock.setup_2fa_desc: Add an extra layer of security to your PIN using an app like Google Authenticator.
unlock.verify_2fa_desc: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to continue.

settings.title: settings
settings.subtitle: Manage application preferences and security configuration.
settings.profile_desc: Customize your local identity and appearance.
settings.security_desc: Layers of protection against unauthorized access.
settings.anti_screenshot_desc: Prevents the window from being captured or broadcast (Windows API).
settings.quiet_mode_desc: Does not ask for confirmation when closing a message — message is instantly cleared from RAM.
settings.2fa_desc: Ask for an extra security code during login.
settings.auto_cleanup_desc: Downloaded .paracci files are permanently deleted from local disk after this period.
settings.session_defaults_desc: Default behavior for newly created sessions.
settings.default_ttl_desc: New sessions automatically close after this period. Infinite is not recommended for security.
settings.sys_info_desc: Application data directories and configuration paths.

setup.step2: Send file to Y (USB, encrypted email, etc.)
setup.step3_p1: Import the responder file sent by Y
setup.label: Session name
setup.ttl_hint: Session will be completely closed after this period.
setup.standard_desc: Fast and secure. Ideal for low-end hardware.
setup.custom_desc: Custom parameters. Build your own armor.
setup.seal_info_desc_p1: These settings are permanently burned into the session file (Initiator). They
setup.hw_advice_desc_p1: Based on local tests, this profile will take approximately
setup.security_hint: This setting determines message decryption speed and brute-force resistance.
setup.color_hint: Select a color for this session or enter a custom hex code.
setup.title: New Session
setup.subtitle: Start a new encrypted channel.
setup.hw_report_error: An error occurred while fetching the report.
setup.initiator_desc: You are importing the first file created by X. Your session is created, responder file downloads automatically.
setup.responder_desc: You are importing the response file sent by Y. Your session activates and bonding starts.
setup.file_hint: Click to select or drag file
setup.import_hint: Enter a name if importing an Initiator file. Can be left empty for Responder.
setup.import_initiator_subtitle: Join an encrypted channel by uploading the Initiator file sent to you.
setup.error_responder_redirect: This is a Responder (reply) file. Please upload it inside the relevant session page.

session.import_invalid: Not a Paracci file or file is corrupt.
session.role_error: You already started this session as X. Cannot import as Y.
session.y_init_success: Session established. Downloading Responder file — send this to X.
session.error_session_not_found_id: No session found for this responder file. (ID: {id}...)
session.error_role_mismatch: This responder file is not for you. (Current Role: {role})
session.error_x_only_responder: Only the initiator (X) can upload a responder file.
session.error_invalid_responder: Invalid file. Please select a Responder file.
session.error_mismatched_session: This file belongs to another session.
session.file_is_msg: This file might be a message file — open it from the session page.
session.bond_not_established_x: Bond not yet established. You must import the Responder file.
session.bond_not_established_y: Bond not yet established. Wait for X's first message.
session.import_responder_desc: Upload the responder file (.paracci) sent by the peer to establish the secure Bond.
session.export_forbidden: Export is not allowed for this session.
session.fingerprint_desc: Verify this code through another channel. It must be identical on both sides.
session.label_change_hint: Label is permanent and tied to the handshake.
session.text_copied_notify: Text copied. Clipboard will clear in 30 seconds.
session.single_use_alert: This message was single-use and was destroyed upon opening.
session.clipboard_failed_locked: Clipboard access failed. It might be locked by another application.
session.pending_desc_x_p1: Did you send the Initiator file to Y? Activate your session by uploading the Responder file from the other peer below.
session.pending_desc_y: Responder file created. Send it to X; the session will activate on their side.
session.bond_complete_desc: The handshake is complete. You can now start messaging securely.
session.ready_desc_p1: You can now encrypt or open messages. However, ensure you have delivered your
session.ready_desc_p3: so they can start the session.
session.checklist_item1: Did you delete the Initiator/Responder files from your computer?
session.checklist_item2: Ensure you also clear these files from the recycle bin.
session.checklist_hint: These files are no longer needed after bonding is established. Deleting them is critical for your security.
session.seal_subtitle: This message is deleted from both sides as soon as it is opened.
session.message_placeholder: Write your message here… # Header, **Bold**, etc.
session.add_files_hint: Drag files or click to select
session.msg_ttl_hint: File becomes invalid if not opened within the specified time.
session.allow_download_hint1: If off, the other party can only view the message.
session.open_subtitle: Upload the incoming .paracci file and decrypt.
session.expired_desc: This session has expired. Messages can no longer be sent or opened.
session.close_modal_desc: This message is single-use. If you close it, data will be cleared from RAM and you won't be able to open this envelope again.
session.close_modal_dont_ask: Don't ask again (Enable Fast Exit mode)

profile.title: User Profile
profile.subtitle: This information is stored on your local device and is not visible to other users.
profile.nickname_hint: Only shown on your side to identify who is using the app.

preview.not_found_title: Preview expired or file not found.
preview.not_found_desc: For security reasons, files are kept in RAM for a short time.
preview.security_warning_desc_p1: This file is in an executable format ({ext}). It may contain harmful code. Content is shown
preview.security_warning_desc_p2: for review purposes only. Do not run it on your computer.
preview.review_mode_desc_p2: Scripts are disabled for security reasons.
preview.video_not_supported: Your browser does not support video playback.
preview.cannot_preview: This file type cannot be previewed.
